slides.title: Your Personal Spiritual Journey Begins Here
slides.subtitle: Explore five spiritual systems in one beautiful app
slides.description: The welcoming home screen features DMT-inspired visuals and four main tabs: Learn, Profiles, Breathwork, and Soul.

slides.title: Create Your Spiritual Profile in Minutes
slides.subtitle: Simple setup with powerful results
slides.description: Enter your birth information with our intuitive form. Start with just 3 fields or add up to 36 for maximum accuracy.

slides.title: 5 Spiritual Systems, One Complete Profile
slides.subtitle: Numerology • Astrology • Ayurveda • Human Design • Tantric
slides.description: See your complete spiritual blueprint with calculations from all five ancient wisdom traditions.
features: Numerology: Life Path, Expression, Soul Urge

slides.title: AI-Powered Insights Tailored to Your Unique Energy
slides.subtitle: Personalized wisdom from Claude 4.5
slides.description: Advanced AI analysis creates 6 sections of personalized spiritual insights based on your complete profile.

slides.title: Discover Your Soul's Deeper Purpose
slides.subtitle: 500-1000 words of personalized wisdom
slides.description: AI-generated insights synthesize all five spiritual systems to reveal your life's deeper meaning and direction.

slides.title: Your Personalized Spiritual Growth Roadmap
slides.subtitle: Honest, compassionate guidance for evolution
slides.description: The Growth Edges section reveals challenges and opportunities for spiritual development based on your birth chart.

slides.title: Daily Spiritual Guidance, Personalized for You
slides.subtitle: 11-section horoscope tailored to your birth chart
slides.description: Receive daily guidance generated by AI based on current planetary transits and your unique spiritual profile.

slides.title: Analyze Yourself, Friends, Family, and Partners
slides.subtitle: Unlimited profiles for everyone in your life
slides.description: Create and manage unlimited spiritual profiles. Perfect for understanding relationships and comparing compatibility.

slides.title: Discover Your Spiritual Compatibility
slides.subtitle: Unified scoring across all 5 systems (0-100 scale)
slides.description: Compare two profiles with AI-generated relationship insights. See strengths, challenges, and recommendations.

slides.title: See the Complete Picture of Your Spiritual Blueprint
slides.subtitle: Real analysis with accurate calculations
slides.description: Example profile showing the depth of SpiritAtlas analysis with complete birth chart, numerology, and personalized insights.

app_features_summary: 5 spiritual systems (Numerology, Astrology, Ayurveda, Human Design, Tantric)
